headline: CFTC Favors $1B Sports Contracts Over Crypto Betting

article.title: CFTC proposes framework favoring sports event contracts over gambling
article.summary: The proposed rules would preserve election markets and allow many sports-based prediction contracts while limiting bets that could encourage manipulation.
